{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=Potato is the best remedy for famine, and Dr. David is committed to developing improved potatoes in the hope of resolving world hunger...
|affct=CIV
|hard=ATK
|source=[[Value_Packs#Maneater_Value_Pack|Maneater Value Pack]]
|color=green
|earth=1
|water=2
|fire=1
|wind=2
|form=Mutant
|element=Earth
|realm=Hellas
|orangehard=ATK
}}
